form.formComment: Solid performance to win by half a length at Warrnambool over 390m (22.33) beating Paw Pascal in Grade 5 on April 9. Looks a solid contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by half a length at Warrnambool over 390m (22.33) beating Paw Pascal in Grade 5 on April 9. Looks a solid contender.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (23.18) over 400m at this track. Has a low draw. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last time (23.18) over 400m at this track. Has a low draw. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.16) when fourth over 515m at Sandown in a Grade 5. Has two successes and two minors from six starts from box 3. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (30.16) when fourth over 515m at Sandown in a Grade 5. Has two successes and two minors from six starts from box 3. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.33) when seventh over 460m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Tough line-up and may struggle.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (26.33) when seventh over 460m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Tough line-up and may struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and fell in catching pen.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a seventh over 400m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a seventh over 400m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 2.25 lengths fourth (16.81) over 300m at Healesville. Has clocked an excellent 22.64 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Returns from a 12 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a sixth (22.84) over 390m at Shepparton. Capable of playing a role in the finish.
